## Goal

Improve Windows compatibility notes for local development and possible WebUI
demo usage.

## Suggested Scope

- Document Python version, PortAudio/PyAudio setup, and microphone selection.
- Clarify which features require Linux/Raspberry Pi systemd services.
- Add troubleshooting notes for local Whisper, TTS playback, and USB audio
  devices.
- Add lightweight tests or smoke checks where possible.

## Acceptance Notes

- Do not include real recordings, credentials, logs, voiceprint templates, or
  personal data.
- Keep the privacy-first and human-review positioning.
